categories.name: decomposition_failure
categories.evidence: Agent began editing package A before reading package B, which contained the interface definition needed to understand the correct change.

categories.name: multi_repo_scope_failure
categories.evidence: Task spanned packages/core/ and packages/plugins/. Agent never opened any file in packages/plugins/.

annotations.notes: Exemplar: multiple failure modes compounding. Decomposition failure led to scope failure and excessive exploration.
